name: thoughttrace
description: ThoughtTrace (SCAI-JHU/ThoughtTrace, CC-BY-4.0): real user turns from human-LLM conversations, cohorts by survey-reported gender (female target vs male baseline) plus a null author split within the female pool. Texts truncated to <=120 words; see data/thoughttrace/README.md.

cohorts.name: target
cohorts.description: ThoughtTrace users self-reporting gender=Female in the exit survey.

cohorts.name: baseline
cohorts.description: ThoughtTrace users self-reporting gender=Male in the exit survey.

cohorts.name: null_split_a
cohorts.description: Random half of held-out female users (seeded); null-control cohort.

cohorts.name: null_split_b
cohorts.description: Other random half of held-out female users (seeded); null-control cohort.

comparisons.name: target_vs_baseline
comparisons.notes: Modality-match validation (real LLM prompts): y = self-reported gender (gold exit survey), female vs male. No published separability benchmark - exploratory. Observer-aware study: participants knew turns and thoughts were being recorded, which may shift register.

comparisons.name: null_split
comparisons.notes: Negative control: seeded random author split within the female pool (disjoint from target cohort authors). Expect C2ST ~= 0.5, zero BH survivors, null MMD.
